name: ROS 2 Jazzy Dev Container
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e && apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl gnupg2 lsb-release build-essential python3-colcon-common-extensions ros-dev-tools && curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ros/rosdistro/master/ros.key | apt-key add - && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture)] http://packages.ros.org/ros2/ubuntu $(lsb_release -cs) main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ros2.list && apt-get update && apt-get install -y ros-jazzy-desktop && rosdep update && mkdir -p ~/ros2_ws/src && cd ~/ros2_ws && colcon build && echo "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash" >> ~/.bashrc && echo "source ~/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash" >> ~/.bashrc'
